All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Enum Summary Exception Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractGeminiClient
    Abstract base class for Gemini client implementations, providing shared functionality.
    AbstractHttpClient
    Abstract base class for HTTP client implementations, providing common functionality.
    AbstractJsonService
    Abstract base class for JSON serialization and deserialization implementations.
    AbstractResource
    Abstract base class for resource implementations, providing shared functionality.
    AnswerStyle
    Style for grounded answers.
    AnswerStyleEnum
    Specifies the desired style for generating grounded answers.
    AttributionSourceId
    Identifier for the source contributing to this attribution.
    BaseClass
    Base class that provides logging functionality for all classes in the application.
    BatchEmbedContentsResponse
    The response to a BatchEmbedContentsRequest.
    BatchEmbedTextResponse
    The response to an EmbedTextRequest.
    Blob
    Raw media bytes.
    BlockedReason
    A list of reasons why content may have been blocked.
    BlockedReasonEnum
    Lists the reasons why content may have been blocked during processing.
    BlockReason
    Specifies what was the reason why input was blocked.
    BlockReasonEnum
    Specifies the reason why the prompt was blocked.
    CachedContent
    Represents a cached content.
    Candidate
    A response candidate generated from the model.
    Chunk
    A Chunk is a subpart of a Document that is treated as an independent unit for the purposes of vector representation and storage.
    ChunkData
    Extracted data that represents the Chunk content.
    CitationMetadata
    A collection of source attributions for a piece of content.
    CitationSource
    A citation to a source for a portion of a specific response.
    Condition
    Filter condition applicable to a single key.
    Content
    The base structured datatype containing multipart content of a message.
    Content.ContentBuilder  
    ContentEmbedding
    A list of floats representing an embedding.
    ContentFilter
    Content filtering metadata associated with processing a single request.
    CountMessageTokensResponse
    A response from models.countMessageTokens.
    CountTextTokensResponse
    A response from models.countTextTokens.
    CountTokensResponse
    Response from models.countTokens.
    CustomHttpClient
    Custom HTTP client implementation that wraps a user-provided HttpClient.
    CustomMetadata
    User provided metadata stored as key-value pairs.
    DefaultHttpClient
    Default implementation of the HttpClient interface using Apache HttpClient.
    EmbedContentRequest
    Request containing the Content for the model to embed.
    EmbedContentResponse
    The response to an EmbedContentRequest.
    Embedding
    A list of floats representing the embedding.
    EmbedTextRequest
    Request to get a text embedding from the model.
    EmbedTextResponse
    The response to an EmbedTextRequest.
    ErrorResponse
    Represents an error response from the Gemini API.
    ErrorResponse.ErrorResponseBuilder  
    FileData
    URI based data.
    FinishReason
    Defines the reason why the model stopped generating tokens.
    FinishReasonEnum
    Defines the possible reasons why the model stopped generating tokens.
    FunctionCall
    A predicted FunctionCall returned from the model that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name with the arguments and their values.
    FunctionCallingConfig
    Configuration for specifying function calling behavior.
    FunctionDeclaration
    Structured representation of a function declaration as defined by the OpenAPI 3.03 specification.
    FunctionResponse
    The result output from a FunctionCall that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name and a structured JSON object containing any output from the function is used as context to the model.
    GeminiApiException
    Base class for all exceptions thrown by the Gemini4J library.
    GeminiClient
    Interface defining the contract for interacting with the Google Gemini API.
    GeminiClientBuilder
    Builder for creating GeminiClient instances.
    GeminiClientBuilder.GeminiClientBuilderBuilder  
    GeminiFailedPreconditionException
    Thrown when a precondition is not met.
    GeminiInternalException
    Thrown when an unexpected error occurs on the server side.
    GeminiInvalidArgumentException
    Thrown when the request contains an invalid argument.
    GeminiNotFoundException
    Thrown when the requested resource is not found.
    GeminiPermissionDeniedException
    Thrown when the API key doesn't have sufficient permissions.
    GeminiResourceExhaustedException
    Thrown when the rate limit is exceeded.
    GeminiUnavailableException
    Thrown when the service is temporarily overloaded or unavailable.
    GenerateAnswerRequest
    Request to generate a grounded answer from the model given an input GenerateAnswerRequest.
    GenerateAnswerResponse
    Response from the model for a grounded answer.
    GenerateContentRequest
    Request to generate a completion from the model.
    GenerateContentRequest.GenerateContentRequestBuilder  
    GenerateContentResponse
    response from the model supporting multiple candidates.
    GenerateTextResponse
    Response from the model supporting multiple candidates.
    GenerationConfig
    Configuration options for model generation and outputs.
    GenerationConfig.GenerationConfigBuilder  
    GenerationResource
    Interface defining the contract for interacting with the Generation resource of the Gemini API.
    GenerationResourceImpl
    Implementation of the GenerationResource interface for interacting with the Generation resource of the Gemini API.
    GroundingAttribution
    Attribution for a source that contributed to an answer.
    GroundingPassage
    Passage included inline with a grounding configuration.
    GroundingPassageId
    Identifier for a part within a GroundingPassage.
    GroundingPassages
    A repeated list of passages.
    HarmBlockThreshold
    Block at and beyond a specified harm probability.
    HarmBlockThresholdEnum
    Defines the harm probability thresholds for content blocking.
    HarmCategory
    The category of a rating.
    HarmCategoryEnum
    Represents the categories of potential harm that content can be classified into.
    HarmProbability
    The probability that a piece of content is harmful.
    HarmProbabilityEnum
    Represents the probability levels that content is classified with for each harm category.
    HttpClient
    Interface defining the contract for HTTP client implementations.
    HttpClientBuilder
    Builder for creating HttpClient instances.
    HttpClientBuilder.HttpClientBuilderBuilder  
    HttpClientType
    Enum representing the available HTTP client types.
    HttpException
    Exception class representing an error during a Gemini API request.
    HttpResponse
    Represents an HTTP response.
    InputFeedback
    Feedback related to the input data used to answer the question, as opposed to model-generated response to the question.
    JacksonJsonService
    Default implementation of the JsonService interface using Jackson.
    JsonException
    Exception class representing an error during JSON serialization or deserialization.
    JsonService
    Interface defining the contract for JSON serialization and deserialization.
    JsonServiceBuilder
    Builder for creating JsonService instances.
    JsonServiceBuilder.JsonServiceBuilderBuilder  
    JsonServiceType
    Enum representing the available JSON service types.
    ListCachedContentsResponse
    Response with CachedContents list.
    ListModel
    Response from ListModel containing a paginated list of Models.
    ListPermissionsResponse
    Response from ListPermissions containing a paginated list of permissions.
    Message
    A message within a conversation.
    MessagePrompt
    The structured textual input given to the model as a prompt.
    MetadataFilter
    User provided filter to limit retrieval based on Chunk or Document level metadata values.
    Mode
    Defines the execution behavior for function calling by defining the execution mode.
    ModeEnum
    Defines the execution modes for function calling, dictating how the model handles function predictions.
    Model
    Information about a Generative Language Model.
    Model.ModelBuilder  
    ModelResource
    Interface defining the contract for interacting with the Model resource of the Gemini API.
    ModelResourceImpl
    Implementation of the ModelResource interface for interacting with the Model resource of the Gemini API.
    Operator
    Defines the valid operators that can be applied to a key-value pair.
    OperatorEnum
    Defines the operators that can be applied to key-value pairs when filtering content based on metadata.
    Part
    A datatype containing media that is part of a multipart Content message.
    Part.PartBuilder  
    Permission
    Represents a permission.
    PermissionState
    The permission's state.
    PermissionStateEnum
    Represents the possible states of a permission.
    PromptFeedback
    A set of the feedback metadata the prompt specified in GenerateContentRequest.content.
    RelevantChunk
    The information for a chunk relevant to a query.
    ResourceBuilder
    Builder for creating resource instances.
    ResourceBuilder.ResourceBuilderBuilder  
    SafetyRating
    Safety rating for a piece of content.
    SafetySetting
    Safety setting, affecting the safety-blocking behavior.
    Schema
    The Schema object allows the definition of input and output data types.
    SemanticRetrieverChunk
    Identifier for a Chunk retrieved via Semantic Retriever specified in the GenerateAnswerRequest using SemanticRetrieverConfig.
    SemanticRetrieverConfig
    Configuration for retrieving grounding content from a Corpus or Document created using the Semantic Retriever API.
    State
    States for the lifecycle of a Chunk.
    StateEnum
    Defines the states for the lifecycle of a Chunk.
    StringList
    User provided string values assigned to a single metadata key.
    TaskType
    Type of task for which the embedding will be used.
    TaskTypeEnum
    Defines the type of task for which an embedding will be used.
    TextPrompt
    The free-form input text given to the model as a prompt.
    Tool
    Tool details that the model may use to generate response.
    ToolConfig
    The Tool configuration containing parameters for specifying Tool use in the request.
    Type
    Type contains the list of OpenAPI data types as defined by ...
    TypeEnum
    Enumerates the supported OpenAPI data types, as defined by OpenAPI Specification v3.0.3.
    UsageMetadata
    Metadata on the usage of the cached content.
    User
    The user that sent this message.
